final_prompt.prompt:
Create a smartphone-style Instagram photo of a Korean café scene with fashionable coffee and dessert.

Style/medium: needs a "Korean café" aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be smartphone-shot framing, suitable for Instagram Stories, no people visible
Subject: must include fashionable coffee drink and dessert as focal subjects
Scene/backdrop: must include Korean café interior context
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy, "Instagrammable" atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a trendy, warm-cool balanced direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a casual smartphone photo texture — exact grain and softness is yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations with the following rules:
  - 7:3 ratio of hiragana to simple kanji
  - Short, diary-like, self-talk style comments
  - Drink comments: taste, temperature, mood (e.g., さっぱり、やさしい甘み)
  - Food comments: texture, deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、さいこう)
  - Space comments: atmosphere (e.g., リラックス、いい時間)
  - Overall: one-line summary (e.g., しあわせすぎる～)
Constraints: must include thin white hand-drawn sketch lines around objects, rough one-stroke uneven style, outline tracing, arrows and dotted lines for eye guidance, decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emojis) in moderation with留白 (blank space), must preserve "Instagram Stories style" and "magazine rough notes style", must be stylish yet casual
Avoid: must avoid overcrowding, must avoid formal text, must avoid realistic photo without annotations
